mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.role_code as roleCode, r.role_name as roleName, r.description, ur.created_at as createdAt FROM role r INNER JOIN user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ur.created_at desc
SELECT u.id as userId, u.username, u.name, u.position, ur.created_at as createdAt FROM users u INNER JOIN user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id WHERE ur.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY ur.created_at desc
mapper.insert:
insert into user_role(user_id, role_id, created_at) values
(#{userId}, #{roleId}, now())
mapper.select: select * from user_role where user_id = #{userId} and role_id = #{roleId}
